user.name: Fluixo

tweets.text:
Prompting is asking AI to do one thing.

Loop engineering is building a system that keeps doing the right thing without you waking it up.

That is the shift.

Not:

“Claude, check my project.”

But:

wake up at 6am
read CI, issues, commits
pick what matters
create isolated https://t.co/DqnZsJA9kc https://t.co/f7bgLhiJXQ
tweets.name: Fluixo

tweets.text:
A domain is not just a name.

It is a timestamp.

The person who buys the term early pays $12.

The person who buys the same term after the market understands it pays six figures.

That is the whole game.

Most domain investors watch lagging signals:

Google Trends.
Expired https://t.co/TDVrUne6bE https://t.co/z9trgwn7Lf
tweets.name: Fluixo

tweets.text:
Claude Fable 5 is back.

Do not waste it on small tasks.

Not buttons.
Not copy edits.
Not simple refactors.
Not “make this cleaner”.

Use cheaper models for that.

Fable 5 is for work with leverage:

clone software you already pay for
audit your Claude and Codex setup
design https://t.co/ZaAPy3k9KQ https://t.co/iwWeX34Of5
tweets.name: Fluixo

tweets.text:
Most people use ChatGPT and Claude like magic boxes.

But every frontier model is built through the same pipeline.

Data.
Pretraining.
Supervised fine-tuning.
Reward modeling.
Reinforcement learning.

That is the whole shape.

First, you clean a mountain of text.

Then the model https://t.co/m76FC8vIxj https://t.co/6PqNjMAh9m
tweets.name: Fluixo

tweets.text:
I built a Telegram bot called Open Offers.

It’s a place where content creators, KOLs, and people in Web3 can find open partnership opportunities in one place.

When I first started looking for offers, there were barely any. I had to join dozens of Telegram chats just to catch a https://t.co/GcfrUMGwhQ

tweets.text:
A $200 Claude subscription does not become a $40,000/month business by itself.

The business is not the tool.

The business is the wedge.

Help 3 small businesses for free.
Find one painful workflow.
Build one useful AI fix.
Get one real testimonial.
Turn that proof into a $500 https://t.co/PqsN9d7ziP https://t.co/fEHwH2FU1L
tweets.name: Fluixo

tweets.text:
Faceless YouTube is not about hiding your face.

It is about building a repeatable media machine.

The stack is simple:

Claude writes the script.
ElevenLabs reads it.
Runway and Midjourney build the visuals.
CapCut assembles the video.
VidIQ helps package it for search.
YouTube https://t.co/hDt11E65Fn https://t.co/8FzPeukNSA
tweets.name: Fluixo

tweets.text:
I spent way too much time trying to build this manually in Obsidian.

GTM history.
Failed experiments.
Dead channels.
Old positioning ideas.
Customer objections.
Launch notes.
Things I promised myself not to repeat.

All of it.

Because most AI tools have the same problem:

they https://t.co/SdrccRmC2t https://t.co/UFCua6A7YT
